In addition to the Part C and Part D monthly model segment codes, the file also includes monthly long-term 
institutional (LTI) indicators (LTI_IND_01–12). The LTI indicators are consistent with the model segment codes when a 
beneficiary is a non-ESRD full risk beneficiary. The demographic variables that are in the base file are demographics 
that CMS used in the risk score development and within the risk score file; it is possible that some
